textPlain: I guess people who are running their own registries like Nexus and build their own container images from a common base image are feeling at least a bit more secure in their choice right now.Wonder how many builds or redeployments this will break. Personally, nothing against Docker or Docker Hub of course, I find them to be useful.
...well this explains a lot about how my morning is going...
Only if they get their base images from somewhere else...
